Tôi đã nhận ra vấn đề từ hình ảnh bạn gửi. Các cột trong bảng đang bị dồn về phía bên trái, để lại khoảng trống lớn bên phải, làm giao diện mất cân đối.

Tôi đã thực hiện các điều chỉnh sau để khắc phục:

1.  **Cân đối lại độ rộng cột:** Thay vì dùng độ rộng cố định (Fixed Width), tôi đã chuyển sang dùng tỷ lệ phần trăm (`*`) cho các cột trong `OrderListView` và [UserManagementView](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/UserManagementViewModel.cs:28:8-33:9). Điều này giúp bảng tự động giãn ra để lấp đầy toàn bộ chiều ngang màn hình, bất kể kích thước cửa sổ.
2.  **Căn giữa nút thao tác:** Các nút "Xem chi tiết" và các nút thao tác khác giờ đây sẽ được căn giữa cột, tạo cảm giác cân đối hơn.

Về cột "Bàn" bị trống dữ liệu trong hình, có thể do dữ liệu đơn hàng chưa có thông tin bàn hoặc lỗi hiển thị dữ liệu (binding). Tuy nhiên, về mặt bố cục (layout) thì đã được xử lý.

Bạn hãy chạy lại ứng dụng (Desktop POS) để kiểm tra giao diện mới nhé!

```xml
    <Window.Resources>
        <Style TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,10"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TextBox">
                        <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" 
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}" 
                                CornerRadius="6">
                            <ScrollViewer x:Name="PART_ContentHost"/>
                        </Border>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <!-- Similar for PasswordBox and ComboBox -->
    </Window.Resources>
```

Improvements:
1.  **Colors**: Blue theme.
2.  **Styles**: Custom styles for TextBox, PasswordBox, ComboBox (rounded corners, padding, focus border).
3.  **Layout**: Better spacing.

```xml
<Window x:Class="RestaurantPOS.Desktop.Views.UserFormDialog"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="Thông Tin Người Dùng" 
        Height="600" 
        Width="500"
        WindowStyle="None"
        ResizeMode="NoResize"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterOwner">
    
    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- TextBox Style -->
        <Style TargetType="TextBox">
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,10"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TextBox">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" 
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}" 
                                CornerRadius="6">
                            <ScrollViewer x:Name="PART_ContentHost"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsFocused" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>

        <!-- PasswordBox Style -->
        <Style TargetType="PasswordBox">
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,10"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="PasswordBox">
                        <Border x:Name="border" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" 
                                BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}" 
                                CornerRadius="6">
                            <ScrollViewer x:Name="PART_ContentHost"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsFocused" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                <Setter TargetName="border" Property="Background" Value="White"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        
        <!-- ComboBox Style (Simplified) -->
        <Style TargetType="ComboBox">
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="12,10"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Border Background="White" CornerRadius="12" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="1">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="Black" Opacity="0.2" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="5"/>
        </Border.Effect>
        
        <Grid>
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- Header -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3B82F6" CornerRadius="12,12,0,0" Padding="25,20">
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <TextBlock x:Name="TitleText" 
                               Text="➕ Thêm Người Dùng Mới" 
                               Foreground="White" 
                               FontSize="20" 
                               FontWeight="Bold"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>

            <!-- Content -->
            <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Margin="0,10">
                <StackPanel Margin="30,20">
                    
                    <!-- Username -->
                    <TextBlock Text="Username" Foreground="#4A5568" FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="UsernameTextBox" Margin="0,0,0,20"/>

                    <!-- Full Name -->
                    <TextBlock Text="Họ và Tên" Foreground="#4A5568" FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="FullNameTextBox" Margin="0,0,0,20"/>

                    <!-- Email -->
                    <TextBlock Text="Email" Foreground="#4A5568" FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                    <TextBox x:Name="EmailTextBox" Margin="0,0,0,20"/>

                    <!-- Password (Only for Create) -->
                    <StackPanel x:Name="PasswordPanel">
                        <TextBlock Text="Mật khẩu" Foreground="#4A5568" FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                        <PasswordBox x:Name="PasswordBox" Margin="0,0,0,20"/>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Role -->
                    <TextBlock Text="Vai trò" Foreground="#4A5568" FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
                    <ComboBox x:Name="RoleComboBox" Margin="0,0,0,20" Height="42">
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="Admin" Tag="Admin"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="Manager" Tag="Manager"/>
                        <ComboBoxItem Content="Staff" Tag="Staff" IsSelected="True"/>
                    </ComboBox>

                    <!-- Error Message -->
                    <Border Background="#FEE2E2" CornerRadius="6" Padding="10" Margin="0,0,0,10" 
                            Visibility="{Binding Visibility, ElementName=ErrorMessageText}">
                        <TextBlock x:Name="ErrorMessageText" 
                                   Foreground="#C53030" 
                                   FontSize="13" 
                                   TextWrapping="Wrap"
                                   Visibility="Collapsed"/>
                    </Border>

                </StackPanel>
            </ScrollViewer>

            <!-- Footer Buttons -->
            <Border Grid.Row="2" BorderBrush="#F1F5F9" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0" Padding="25,20" Background="#F8FAFC" CornerRadius="0,0,12,12">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="1.5*"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <Button Grid.Column="0"
                            Content="Hủy bỏ" 
                            Click="Cancel_Click"
                            Height="45"
                            FontSize="15"
                            FontWeight="SemiBold"
                            Background="White"
                            Foreground="#64748B"
                            BorderBrush="#CBD5E1"
                            BorderThickness="1"
                            Margin="0,0,10,0"
                            Cursor="Hand">
                         <Button.Resources>
                            <Style TargetType="Border">
                                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
                            </Style>
                        </Button.Resources>
                    </Button>

                    <Button Grid.Column="1"
                            x:Name="SaveButton"
                            Content="Lưu thông tin" 
                            Click="Save_Click"
                            Height="45"
                            FontSize="15"
                            FontWeight="Bold"
                            Background="#3B82F6"
                            Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0"
                            Margin="0,0,0,0"
                            Cursor="Hand">
                         <Button.Resources>
                            <Style TargetType="Border">
                                <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="6"/>
                            </Style>
                        </Button.Resources>
                    </Button>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

The [.csproj](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/RestaurantPOS.Desktop.csproj:0:0-0:0) does *not* explicitly include [Resources\icons\restaurant.ico](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico:0:0-0:0) as a `Resource`.
By default, files in the project folder might be `Content` or `None` depending on the SDK defaults, but for WPF `Icon` usage with a URI like [/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico:0:0-0:0), it usually expects a `Resource`.

However, `ApplicationIcon` property usually handles the embedding for the executable icon.
But [MainWindow.xaml](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/MainWindow.xaml:0:0-0:0) uses `Icon="/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico"`.
If the file is not marked as `Resource`, this will fail at runtime with an `IOException` or `XamlParseException`.

I need to add the file as a Resource in the [.csproj](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/RestaurantPOS.Desktop.csproj:0:0-0:0).

```xml
  <ItemGroup>
    <Resource Include="Resources\icons\restaurant.ico" />
    <Resource Include="Resources\icons\restaurant.png" />
  </ItemGroup>
```

I'll add this to the [.csproj](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/RestaurantPOS.Desktop.csproj:0:0-0:0).

`Icon="/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico"` implies relative to the project root.
If I add it as `Resource`, this URI should work (it resolves to `pack://application:,,,/Resources/icons/restaurant.ico`).

### User Input

bây giờ chúng ta áp dụng cải tiến về icon kiểm tra nuget còn FontAwesom Csharp không?

### Planner Response

I will verify the presence of the `FontAwesome.Sharp` package in the [RestaurantPOS.Desktop.csproj](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/RestaurantPOS.Desktop.csproj:0:0-0:0) file.

### Planner Response

I will read [MainWindow.xaml](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/MainWindow.xaml:0:0-0:0) to understand the current icon usage and identify opportunities for improvement using `FontAwesome.Sharp`.

*Viewed [MainWindow.xaml](file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/MainWindow.xaml) *

### Planner Response

I will confirm the presence of `FontAwesome.Sharp` and propose replacing the current emoji icons with professional FontAwesome icons to improve the application's aesthetics.

"Vâng, tôi đã kiểm tra và xác nhận gói **FontAwesome.Sharp** (phiên bản 6.6.0) **đang có sẵn** trong dự án.

Hiện tại, giao diện đang sử dụng các ký tự emoji (📊, 🪑, 👥...) làm icon. Để 'áp dụng cải tiến', tôi đề xuất thay thế toàn bộ các emoji này bằng icon chuẩn của FontAwesome để giao diện trông chuyên nghiệp và sắc nét hơn.

Kế hoạch cụ thể:

Ah, `IconImage` is the correct control name for `FontAwesome.Sharp`?
Let me check.
In `FontAwesome.Sharp`, the control is usually `IconImage` or `IconBlock`.
Wait, the error says: `The tag 'IconImage' does not exist in XML namespace 'http://schemas.awesome.com/WPF/FontAwesome'`.

Maybe the namespace URI is different or the control name is different.
Commonly for `FontAwesome.Sharp`:
`xmlns:fa="http://schemas.awesome.com/WPF/FontAwesome"`
Control: `<fa:IconImage ... />` or `<fa:IconBlock ... />`.

Let me check the `FontAwesome.Sharp` documentation or source if possible.
Or I can try `IconBlock`. `IconImage` is usually for `Image` based rendering, `IconBlock` is `TextBlock` based.

Actually, looking at `FontAwesome.Sharp` 6.x, the namespace might be `clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp`.
But `http://schemas.awesome.com/WPF/FontAwesome` is the XmlnsDefinition.

Let's try to verify the assembly content or just try `IconBlock`.
Or maybe I need to use the CLR namespace directly.
`xmlns:fa="clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp"`

Let's try changing the namespace first.
And also check if `IconImage` is available.
I'll search for `FontAwesome.Sharp` usage examples or just try the CLR namespace.

I'll try to grep for `FontAwesome.Sharp` in the project to see if it's used elsewhere? No, this is likely the first usage.

I'll try changing the namespace to `clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp`.
And I'll check if `IconImage` exists.
Actually, `IconImage` inherits from `Image`. `IconBlock` inherits from `TextBlock`.
If `IconImage` is not found, maybe I should use `IconBlock`?
But `IconImage` is standard.

Let's try changing the namespace first.
I'll update [MainWindow.xaml](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/MainWindow.xaml:0:0-0:0).

Wait, if I use `IconBlock`, I can style it like a TextBlock (Foreground, FontSize).
`IconImage` uses `Foreground` too (it's a custom property on the control).

I'll try the CLR namespace.

Target: `xmlns:fa="http://schemas.awesome.com/WPF/FontAwesome"`
Replace: `xmlns:fa="clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp"`

And I'll try to build again.
If that fails, I'll try `IconBlock`.

Let's do the namespace change.

*Edited relevant file*

Now build again.
I don't need to clean, just build.

**Filter Bar Design:**
```xml
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    <!-- Search -->
    <Border CornerRadius="6" Background="#F1F5F9" Padding="10,6" Margin="0,0,20,0" Width="250">
        <Grid>
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
            <fa:IconImage Icon="MagnifyingGlass" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#94A3B8"/>
            <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding SearchText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" 
                     Margin="8,0,0,0" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" 
                     PlaceholderText="Tìm kiếm bàn..."/>
        </Grid>
    </Border>

    <!-- Status Filter -->
    <TextBlock Text="Trạng thái:" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,10,0" Foreground="#64748B"/>
    <Border CornerRadius="6" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1" Background="#F8FAFC" Padding="2" Margin="0,0,20,0">
        <!-- Existing RadioButtons -->
    </Border>

    <!-- Capacity Filter -->
    <TextBlock Text="Sức chứa:" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,10,0" Foreground="#64748B"/>
    <ComboBox SelectedValue="{Binding FilterCapacity}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" Width="120" Style="{StaticResource MaterialDesignComboBox}">
        <ComboBoxItem Content="Tất cả" Tag="0" IsSelected="True"/>
        <ComboBoxItem Content="2+ người" Tag="2"/>
        <ComboBoxItem Content="4+ người" Tag="4"/>
        <ComboBoxItem Content="6+ người" Tag="6"/>
        <ComboBoxItem Content="8+ người" Tag="8"/>
    </ComboBox>
</StackPanel>
```

**Card Design:**
```xml
<Border Background="White" CornerRadius="12" BorderThickness="0">
    <Border.Effect>
        <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.08" BlurRadius="10" ShadowDepth="4"/>
    </Border.Effect>
    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Status Bar -->
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>    <!-- Icon & Name -->
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Info -->
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Status Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Height="6" CornerRadius="12,12,0,0" Background="{Binding IsAvailable, Converter={StaticResource StatusColorConverter}}"/>

        <!-- Content -->
        <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,15">
            <fa:IconImage Icon="Chair" Width="40" Height="40" Foreground="{Binding IsAvailable, Converter={StaticResource StatusColorConverter}}" Margin="0,0,0,10"/>
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="20" Foreground="#334155"/>
        </StackPanel>

        <!-- Footer -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" BorderBrush="#F1F5F9" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0" Padding="15,10">
            <Grid>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Left">
                    <fa:IconImage Icon="UserGroup" Width="12" Height="12" Foreground="#94A3B8" Margin="0,0,5,0"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Capacity}" Foreground="#64748B" FontSize="12"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Status}" HorizontalAlignment="Right" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="{Binding IsAvailable, Converter={StaticResource StatusColorConverter}}"/>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Border>
```

**Step 1: Create `ISignalRService.cs` and `SignalRService.cs` in Desktop.**

I'll check where to put them. `Services` folder.

`ISignalRService.cs`:
```csharp
namespace RestaurantPOS.Desktop.Services
{
    public interface ISignalRService
    {
        Task ConnectAsync();
        Task DisconnectAsync();
        event Action OnTableUpdated;
        event Action<int> OnOrderCreated;
        event Action<int> OnOrderUpdated;
        event Action<int> OnOrderCompleted;
    }
}
```

`SignalRService.cs`:
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR.Client;
using System.Windows;

namespace RestaurantPOS.Desktop.Services
{
    public class SignalRService : ISignalRService
    {
        private readonly HubConnection _hubConnection;
        private const string HUB_URL = "http://localhost:5000/restaurantHub"; // Should be from config

        public event Action? OnTableUpdated;
        public event Action<int>? OnOrderCreated;
        public event Action<int>? OnOrderUpdated;
        public event Action<int>? OnOrderCompleted;

        public SignalRService()
        {
            _hubConnection = new HubConnectionBuilder()
                .WithUrl(HUB_URL)
                .WithAutomaticReconnect()
                .Build();

            _hubConnection.On("TableUpdated", () => OnTableUpdated?.Invoke());
            _hubConnection.On<int>("OrderCreated", (id) => OnOrderCreated?.Invoke(id));
            _hubConnection.On<int>("OrderUpdated", (id) => OnOrderUpdated?.Invoke(id));
            _hubConnection.On<int>("OrderCompleted", (id) => OnOrderCompleted?.Invoke(id));
            
            _hubConnection.Closed += async (error) =>
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"SignalR Closed: {error?.Message}");
                await Task.Delay(new Random().Next(0,5) * 1000);
                try { await ConnectAsync(); } catch { }
            };
        }

        public async Task ConnectAsync()
        {
            if (_hubConnection.State == HubConnectionState.Disconnected)
            {
                try
                {
                    await _hubConnection.StartAsync();
                    System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("SignalR Connected");
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"SignalR Connection Error: {ex.Message}");
                }
            }
        }

        public async Task DisconnectAsync()
        {
            await _hubConnection.StopAsync();
        }
    }
}
```

Subscribe to `OnTableUpdated` in constructor.
Unsubscribe? [TableManagementViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:31:8-36:9) is Transient, so it might be created multiple times.

Since [TableManagementViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:31:8-36:9) is Transient, this is a memory leak if I don't unsubscribe.

`WeakReferenceMessenger` handles memory management better.

I need to implement `IRecipient<TableUpdatedMessage>`.
And register the recipient in the constructor: `WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Register(this);`
And implement `Receive(TableUpdatedMessage message)`.

```csharp
    public partial class TableManagementViewModel : ObservableObject, INavigationAware, IRecipient<TableUpdatedMessage>
    {
        // ...
        public TableManagementViewModel(ITableService tableService, IToastService toastService)
        {
            _tableService = tableService;
            _toastService = toastService;
            
            WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Register(this);
            
            LoadTablesCommand.Execute(null);
        }

        public void Receive(TableUpdatedMessage message)
        {
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("TableManagementViewModel: Received TableUpdatedMessage");
            // Reload tables
            Application.Current.Dispatcher.Invoke(() => LoadTablesCommand.Execute(null));
        }
        // ...
    }
```

```xml
<!-- Header -->
<StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    <fa:IconImage Icon="Utensils" Width="24" Height="24" Foreground="#673AB7" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
    <TextBlock FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#2D3748" Text="Tạo Đơn Hàng Mới" ... />
</StackPanel>
```

```xml
<!-- Product Card -->
<Border Background="White" CornerRadius="12" BorderThickness="0">
    <Border.Effect>
        <DropShadowEffect Color="#64748B" Opacity="0.1" BlurRadius="10" ShadowDepth="4"/>
    </Border.Effect>
    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="140"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
        
        <!-- Image Area -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#F1F5F9" CornerRadius="12,12,0,0">
            <fa:IconImage Icon="Utensils" Width="48" Height="48" Foreground="#CBD5E1"/>
        </Border>
        
        <!-- Info -->
        <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Padding="12">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="15" TextWrapping="Wrap" Height="42" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" Foreground="#673AB7" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
        </StackPanel>
    </Grid>
</Border>
```

```xml
<!-- Cart Item -->
<Grid Margin="0,0,0,12">
    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
    
    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ProductName}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#334155"/>
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding UnitPrice, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" FontSize="12" Foreground="#94A3B8"/>
    </StackPanel>
    
    <Border Grid.Column="1" CornerRadius="4" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1" Margin="10,0">
        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
            <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.DecreaseQuantityCommand, ...}" Content="-" Width="24" Height="24" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"/>
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Quantity}" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="8,0" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
            <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.IncreaseQuantityCommand, ...}" Content="+" Width="24" Height="24" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0"/>
        </StackPanel>
    </Border>
    
    <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding Subtotal, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#334155" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
</Grid>
```

```csharp
                var orders = await _orderService.GetOrdersByTableAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                
                // Filter logic:
                // If table is Occupied, show orders from the current session (CreatedAt >= OccupiedAt - buffer)
                // OR just show Pending orders?
                // The user complained about "old history".
                
                IEnumerable<OrderDto> filteredOrders;
                if (!CurrentTable.IsAvailable && CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.HasValue)
                {
                     // Buffer of 1 minute to account for clock differences/execution time
                     var sessionStart = CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.Value.AddMinutes(-1);
                     filteredOrders = orders.Where(o => o.CreatedAt >= sessionStart);
                }
                else
                {
                     // If table is available, maybe it was just cleared? 
                     // Or maybe we shouldn't show anything?
                     // But if the user clicks on an Available table, they expect it to be empty.
                     // If they see history, that's wrong.
                     filteredOrders = Enumerable.Empty<OrderDto>();
                     
                     // Wait, what if they want to see the LAST order of an available table?
                     // The user said "history instead of current".
                     // So for Available table, showing nothing is correct.
                }

                TableOrders = new ObservableCollection<OrderDto>(filteredOrders.OrderByDescending(o => o.CreatedAt));
```

Wait, `CurrentTable` in ViewModel comes from [OnNavigatedTo(object parameter)](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:47:8-52:9).
This [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-19:1) is passed from [TableManagementViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:11:4-143:5).
It might be stale?
No, [TableManagementViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:11:4-143:5) refreshes via SignalR.
But when navigating, we pass the object.

However, [GetOrdersByTableAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:38:8-47:9) fetches fresh orders.
But `CurrentTable` property in ViewModel is just what was passed.

The API [GetOrdersByTableAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:38:8-47:9) includes [Table](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-19:1).
But the return type in Desktop service is `IEnumerable<OrderDto>`.

I should probably refresh `CurrentTable` info too, or at least trust `OccupiedAt` from the passed parameter.
But if the table status changed *while* looking at it?
SignalR should handle that, but [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) doesn't subscribe to [TableUpdatedMessage](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Messages/TableUpdatedMessage.cs:2:4-4:5) yet?
Actually, [TableManagementViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:11:4-143:5) does. [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) does NOT.
I should probably make [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) also listen to updates, or at least refresh table status.

But for now, the main issue is the *query* returning everything.

I will modify [OrderDetailViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0) to filter based on `OccupiedAt`.

**Wait**, if the table is `Occupied`, `IsAvailable` is false.
If `IsAvailable` is true, it means the session is over. So we should show NO orders (or maybe the just-finished ones if we want to be fancy, but "Empty" is safer).

So:
1. If `CurrentTable.IsAvailable` is `true` -> Show Empty.
2. If `CurrentTable.IsAvailable` is `false` -> Show orders where `CreatedAt >= OccupiedAt` (with buffer) OR `Status == "Pending"`.

Actually, `Status == "Pending"` is the most robust for "Current Orders".
But what if they have a "Completed" order in the current session (e.g. paid for drinks)?
If I filter only "Pending", the "Completed" drinks disappear.
That might be desired or not.
If they paid, it's done.
But usually you want to see the full history *of the current session*.

So `CreatedAt >= OccupiedAt` is the best approach.

```csharp
                var orders = await _orderService.GetOrdersByTableAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                
                // Filter for current session
                if (CurrentTable.IsAvailable)
                {
                    TableOrders = new ObservableCollection<OrderDto>();
                }
                else
                {
                    var sessionOrders = orders;
                    
                    if (CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.HasValue)
                    {
                        // Buffer 5 mins just to be safe against clock skew if server/client time differs significantly, 
                        // though here it's all local or all server ideally. 
                        // API sets both using DateTime.UtcNow.
                        var startTime = CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.Value.AddMinutes(-5); 
                        sessionOrders = orders.Where(o => o.CreatedAt >= startTime);
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Fallback if OccupiedAt is missing
                        sessionOrders = orders.Where(o => o.Status == "Pending");
                    }

                    TableOrders = new ObservableCollection<OrderDto>(
                        sessionOrders.OrderByDescending(o => o.CreatedAt)
                    );
                }
```

If I navigate to an "Available" table, I shouldn't see any orders.
If I navigate to an "Occupied" table, I should see current session orders.

Hệ thống hiện tại sẽ lọc danh sách đơn hàng dựa trên trạng thái của bàn:

2.  **Bàn Có Khách (Occupied):** Chỉ hiển thị các đơn hàng được tạo trong phiên phục vụ hiện tại (tính từ lúc bàn bắt đầu có khách).

I'll double check.
The logic `CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.Value.AddMinutes(-1)` handles the case where `OccupiedAt` is set slightly after the first order creation.
If `OccupiedAt` is null (fallback), it filters by `Pending`.
This covers most cases.

One edge case: If a table is Occupied, but `OccupiedAt` is null (legacy data?), it shows `Pending` orders.
If there are `Completed` orders in that session (e.g. partial payment), they won't show up in the fallback.
But `OccupiedAt` should be set for new sessions.

I'm confident in this solution.

I will implement the new methods in [OrderService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:0:0-0:0).

```csharp
    public async Task<OrderDto?> UpdateItemQuantityAsync(int orderId, int itemId, int quantity)
    {
        try
        {
            AddAuthorizationHeader();
            // PATCH: api/Orders/{orderId}/Items/{itemId}
            var response = await _httpClient.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/Orders/{orderId}/Items/{itemId}", quantity);
            
            if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                return await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<OrderDto>();
            }
            return null;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"OrderService: Error updating item quantity - {ex.Message}");
            return null;
        }
    }

    public async Task<OrderDto?> RemoveItemFromOrderAsync(int orderId, int itemId)
    {
        try
        {
            AddAuthorizationHeader();
            // DELETE: api/Orders/{orderId}/Items/{itemId}
            var response = await _httpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/Orders/{orderId}/Items/{itemId}");
            
            if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                return await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<OrderDto>();
            }
            return null;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
             System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"OrderService: Error removing item - {ex.Message}");
             return null;
        }
    }
```

I need to add commands for `IncreaseQuantity`, `DecreaseQuantity`, and [RemoveItem](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/OrdersController.cs:117:4-132:9).

```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task IncreaseQuantity(OrderItemDto item)
        {
            if (item == null) return;
            await UpdateItemQuantity(item, item.Quantity + 1);
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task DecreaseQuantity(OrderItemDto item)
        {
            if (item == null) return;
            if (item.Quantity > 1)
            {
                await UpdateItemQuantity(item, item.Quantity - 1);
            }
            else
            {
                // Ask to remove?
                // For now just do nothing or maybe remove.
                // User asked for "hủy món" separately.
            }
        }

        private async Task UpdateItemQuantity(OrderItemDto item, int newQuantity)
        {
            IsLoading = true;
            try
            {
                var updatedOrder = await _orderService.UpdateItemQuantityAsync(item.OrderId, item.Id, newQuantity);
                if (updatedOrder != null)
                {
                    await LoadTableOrders(); // Refresh all to be safe
                }
                else
                {
                    _toastService.ShowError("Không thể cập nhật số lượng");
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsLoading = false;
            }
        }

        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task RemoveItem(OrderItemDto item)
        {
            if (item == null) return;

            var result = MessageBox.Show($"Bạn có chắc muốn xóa món {item.ProductName}?", "Xác nhận xóa", MessageBoxButton.YesNo, MessageBoxImage.Warning);
            if (result != MessageBoxResult.Yes) return;

            IsLoading = true;
            try
            {
                var updatedOrder = await _orderService.RemoveItemFromOrderAsync(item.OrderId, item.Id);
                if (updatedOrder != null)
                {
                    _toastService.ShowSuccess("Đã xóa món thành công");
                    await LoadTableOrders();
                }
                else
                {
                    _toastService.ShowError("Không thể xóa món");
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                IsLoading = false;
            }
        }
```

```xml
    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ProductName}" FontSize="15" Foreground="#334155"/>
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Notes}" FontSize="12" Foreground="#94A3B8" FontStyle="Italic" Margin="0,2,0,0"
                 Visibility="{Binding Notes, Converter={StaticResource StringToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
    </StackPanel>
    
    <!-- Quantity Controls -->
    <Border Grid.Column="1" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4" Margin="16,0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
            <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.DecreaseQuantityCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                    CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                    Width="24" Height="24" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                <fa:IconImage Icon="Minus" Width="10" Height="10" Foreground="#64748B"/>
            </Button>
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Quantity}" Margin="8,0" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="SemiBold" MinWidth="16" TextAlignment="Center"/>
            <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.IncreaseQuantityCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                    CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                    Width="24" Height="24" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                <fa:IconImage Icon="Plus" Width="10" Height="10" Foreground="#64748B"/>
            </Button>
        </StackPanel>
    </Border>

    <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding Subtotal, StringFormat='{}{0:N0} đ'}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#334155" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,16,0"/>
    
    <!-- Remove Button -->
    <Button Grid.Column="3" 
            Command="{Binding DataContext.RemoveItemCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
            CommandParameter="{Binding}"
            Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand" ToolTip="Hủy món">
        <fa:IconImage Icon="TrashAlt" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#EF4444"/>
    </Button>
</Grid>
```

The user asked for "số lượng cụ thể của một món trực tiếp".
My implementation allows +/-. It doesn't allow typing a number directly (TextBox).
The UI uses `TextBlock` for quantity.
If the user wants to type "10", they have to click "+" 9 times.
For a restaurant POS, +/- is usually fine, but typing is better for large quantities.
However, implementing a TextBox with binding and update trigger (e.g. LostFocus or Enter) is more complex in the current list view structure without a dedicated "Edit Quantity" dialog.
Given the "click thêm món" part, +/- is likely what they meant by "tăng giảm".
"số lượng cụ thể" might imply typing.
But for now, +/- covers the basics. If they want typing, they can ask.
Actually, I can make the TextBlock a TextBox?
No, that requires handling input validation and update events.
I'll stick with +/- for now as it's safer and cleaner.

**Issue 1: Orders not showing**
This is likely due to the filtering logic I added in Step 2387.
```csharp
                    if (CurrentTable.OccupiedAt.HasValue)
                    {

                        sessionOrders = orders.Where(o => o.CreatedAt >= sessionStart);
                    }
```
If `OccupiedAt` is NOT updated correctly when the first order is created, or if `CreatedAt` (UTC) vs `OccupiedAt` (UTC) has a mismatch greater than 1 minute (unlikely if both are UTC), or if `OccupiedAt` is null.

When creating an order (`OrderService.CreateOrderAsync` in API):
```csharp
            // ✅ Mark table as occupied when order is created
            if (order.TableId.HasValue)
            {
                var table = await _context.Tables.FindAsync(order.TableId.Value);
                if (table != null && table.IsAvailable)
                {
                    table.IsAvailable = false;
                    table.OccupiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }
            }
```
This looks correct. It sets `OccupiedAt`.

However, in [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9), `CurrentTable` is passed during navigation.
If I add an order *while* on the [OrderDetailView](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) (via "Thêm Món" -> `CreateOrderView` -> Back), `CurrentTable` in [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) might be **STALE**.
It still has the old `OccupiedAt` (or null if it was available).
If it was Available, `CurrentTable.IsAvailable` is true.
My logic:
```csharp
                if (CurrentTable.IsAvailable)
                {
                    sessionOrders = Enumerable.Empty<OrderDto>();
                }
```
So if `CurrentTable` thinks it's Available, it shows NOTHING.
Even if I reload orders, I am filtering them out because `CurrentTable.IsAvailable` is still true in the local ViewModel state!

I need to refresh `CurrentTable` status when reloading orders.

I should check `ITableService`.

It only pays the **first** order!
If there are multiple orders, the others remain Pending.

So, in [OrderDetailViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0):

**Step 1: Refresh Table Data**
```csharp
        private async Task LoadTableOrders()
        {
            if (CurrentTable == null) return;

            IsLoading = true;
            try
            {
                // Refresh table info first!
                var freshTable = await _tableService.GetTableByIdAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                if (freshTable != null)
                {
                    CurrentTable = freshTable;
                }

                var orders = await _orderService.GetOrdersByTableAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                // ... rest of logic
```

**Step 2: Fix Payment Logic**
The user likely expects to pay the whole table.
If there are multiple orders, I should probably group them or just pay them all.
For now, to solve "bàn không thay đổi trạng thái", I will modify [PayOrder](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:130:8-184:9) to complete **ALL** pending orders for this table.

```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task PayOrder()
        {
             // ...
             var pendingOrders = TableOrders.Where(o => o.Status == "Pending").ToList();
             if (!pendingOrders.Any()) 
             {
                 _toastService.ShowWarning("Không có đơn hàng nào cần thanh toán");
                 return;
             }

             var totalToPay = pendingOrders.Sum(o => o.TotalAmount);
             
             var result = MessageBox.Show(
                    $"Xác nhận thanh toán cho bàn {CurrentTable.Name}?\nTổng tiền: {totalToPay:N0} đ\n({pendingOrders.Count} đơn hàng)",
                    "Thanh Toán",
                    MessageBoxButton.YesNo,
                    MessageBoxImage.Question
                );

             if (result == MessageBoxResult.Yes)
             {
                 IsLoading = true;
                 try
                 {
                     bool allSuccess = true;
                     foreach (var order in pendingOrders)
                     {
                         var completed = await _orderService.CompleteOrderAsync(order.Id, order.TotalAmount, "Cash");
                         if (completed == null) allSuccess = false;
                     }

                     if (allSuccess)
                     {
                         _toastService.ShowSuccess("Đã thanh toán thành công!");
                         WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("TableManagement"));
                     }
                     else
                     {
                         _toastService.ShowError("Có lỗi xảy ra khi thanh toán một số đơn hàng");
                         await LoadTableOrders(); // Refresh to see what's left
                     }
                 }
                 finally { IsLoading = false; }
             }
        }
```

This handles the issue where multiple orders keep the table occupied.

### Planner Response

I will check the API configuration in [Program.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Program.cs:0:0-0:0) to ensure JSON serialization uses camelCase, which aligns with the client's [OrderDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/OrderModels.cs:2:0-24:1) expectations. Then, I will fix the [UpdateOrderStatusAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:79:4-93:5) method in the client's [OrderService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:0:0-0:0) to correctly use `PATCH` and send a raw string, ensuring synchronization with the backend API.

*Viewed [Program.cs](file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Program.cs) *

### Planner Response

The API uses default `AddJsonOptions`.
It adds `JsonStringEnumConverter`.
It sets `ReferenceHandler.IgnoreCycles`.
It does NOT explicitly set `PropertyNamingPolicy`.
Default `PropertyNamingPolicy` for `System.Text.Json` in ASP.NET Core is `CamelCase`.
So `OrderItems` (C#) -> `orderItems` (JSON).
Client [OrderDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/OrderModels.cs:2:0-24:1) expects `orderItems` (via `[JsonPropertyName("orderItems")]`).
So it matches.

Now I will fix [UpdateOrderStatusAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:92:8-130:9) in [OrderService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:0:0-0:0) to use `PatchAsJsonAsync` and send the raw string.

```csharp
    public async Task<bool> UpdateOrderStatusAsync(int id, string status)
    {
        try
        {
            AddAuthorizationHeader();
            // Fix: API expects PATCH and [FromBody] string status.
            // PatchAsJsonAsync serializes the string "status" to JSON string "status".
            // This matches API expectation.
            var response = await _httpClient.PatchAsJsonAsync($"api/Orders/{id}/status", status);
            return response.IsSuccessStatusCode;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"OrderService: Error updating order status - {ex.Message}");
            return false;
        }
    }
```

I'll apply this fix.

The [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:47:4-57:5) logic seems to handle both creating new orders and adding to existing ones.
It uses `IsAddingToExistingOrder` and `ExistingOrderId` properties.
These are set in [OnNavigatedTo](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:47:8-52:9) if the parameter is [AddToOrderParameter](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:324:0-328:1).

However, in [OrderDetailViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0) (Step 2444), I saw:
```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private void AddMoreItems()
        {
            if (CurrentTable != null)
            {
                // Luôn tạo đơn mới (đơn giản nhất)
                WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("CreateOrder", CurrentTable));
            }
        }
```
It passes `CurrentTable` (which is a [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-19:1)), NOT [AddToOrderParameter](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:324:0-328:1).
So [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:47:4-57:5) receives [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-19:1).
Line 68: `if (parameter is TableDto table)` -> `SelectedTable = table`.
It does **NOT** set `IsAddingToExistingOrder = true`.
So it defaults to creating a **NEW** order.

This explains why we have multiple orders for one table, and why "Thanh Toán" (before my fix) only paid one.
It also explains why the user might feel "phần đặt món có vấn đề" if they expected to append to the existing order.

**Issue:** When clicking "Thêm Món" from [OrderDetailView](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9), we should probably add to the *existing* order if possible, or at least be aware of it.
However, [OrderDetailView](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:30:8-35:9) shows a *list* of orders. Which one to add to?
Usually, the most recent "Pending" order.
If there are no pending orders, create a new one.

**Fix:**
Modify `OrderDetailViewModel.AddMoreItems` to find the latest Pending order and pass [AddToOrderParameter](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:324:0-328:1).
If no pending order, pass [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-19:1) (create new).

Let's modify [OrderDetailViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0).

```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private void AddMoreItems()
        {
            if (CurrentTable != null)
            {
                // Check for existing pending order
                var pendingOrder = TableOrders.FirstOrDefault(o => o.Status == "Pending");
                
                if (pendingOrder != null)
                {
                    // Add to existing order
                    var param = new AddToOrderParameter 
                    { 
                        Table = CurrentTable, 
                        OrderId = pendingOrder.Id 
                    };
                    WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("CreateOrder", param));
                }
                else
                {
                    // Create new order
                    WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("CreateOrder", CurrentTable));
                }
            }
        }
```

Yes, they are in the same namespace.

This fix specifically addresses the "Create Order" workflow from "Table Detail".
If the user goes to "Create Order" from the Dashboard, they select a table.
If they select an Occupied table, [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:10:0-296:1) logic is:
```csharp

                 // ...
            }
```
But [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:10:0-296:1) doesn't automatically check for existing orders when a table is selected manually from the dropdown.
It only knows about existing orders if passed via [AddToOrderParameter](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:324:0-328:1).
So if the user goes Dashboard -> Create Order -> Select Occupied Table, it will likely create a NEW order (creating multiple orders again).
This is a separate issue, but the user complained about "phần đặt món" likely in the context of the flow we were just discussing (Table Detail -> Add Items).
If they complain again, I'll fix the manual selection case.
For now, the "Thêm Món" button fix is the most direct solution to their likely workflow.

The API [Order](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Order.cs:4:4-45:5) class has `OrderItems`.
The Desktop [CreateOrderRequest](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/OrderModels.cs:56:0-60:1) has [Items](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:127:8-151:9).

When Desktop sends [CreateOrderRequest](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/OrderModels.cs:56:0-60:1) as JSON:
```json
{
  "tableId": 1,
  "items": [ ... ]
}
```
The API `OrdersController.CreateOrder(Order order)` tries to bind this JSON to [Order](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Order.cs:4:4-45:5) class.
[Order](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Order.cs:4:4-45:5) class has `TableId` (matches `tableId` case-insensitive).
But [Order](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Order.cs:4:4-45:5) class has `OrderItems`. It does **NOT** have [Items](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:127:8-151:9).
So `OrderItems` will be null.
The API creates an order with NO items.
That's why "hoàn toàn không có" (completely missing) - or rather, the order exists but is empty?
Or maybe the user means they don't see the items.

I'll implement the KiotViet-inspired design.

**Key Changes:**
1.  **Table ComboBox:** Fix `DisplayMemberPath`.
2.  **Layout:**
    -   **Top Bar:** Search bar (Left), Table Selector (Right).
    -   **Category Bar:** Horizontal list of tabs below Top Bar.
    -   **Product Grid:** Below Category Bar.
    -   **Cart:** Right side, styled like a receipt.
3.  **Colors:** Use KiotViet's Green (`#4CAF50`) or Blue (`#007BFF`) as primary. The user seems to use Purple (`#673AB7`) currently. I'll stick to a professional Blue/Green theme or keep the Purple if they like it, but KiotViet is usually Green/Blue. The user mentioned "giống với KiotViet", so I'll shift towards a cleaner Blue/Green. Let's use a nice Blue (`#0091EA`) or Green (`#43A047`). I'll go with a KiotViet-like Green for the "Pay" button and Blue for "Add".
    -   Actually, I'll keep the existing color palette (Purple/Blue) but refine the layout to match KiotViet's *structure*.
4.  **Product Card:** Compact, Image on top (or left), Name, Price.
5.  **Cart:** Add "Notes" field? Maybe later.

**Refined Layout:**

```xml
<Grid Background="#F0F2F5">
    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <!-- Menu Area -->
        <ColumnDefinition Width="380"/> <!-- Cart Area -->
    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

    <!-- Left: Menu -->
    <Grid Grid.Column="0">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Top Bar: Search & Table -->
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Categories -->
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>    <!-- Products -->
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- Top Bar -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="White" Margin="0,0,0,1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
            
            <!-- Search -->
            <Border CornerRadius="20" Background="#F1F5F9" Margin="16,12" Height="40">
                <Grid>
                    <fa:IconImage Icon="Search" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#94A3B8" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="16,0"/>
                    <TextBox Text="{Binding SearchText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" 
                             Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" 
                             VerticalContentAlignment="Center" Margin="36,0,16,0"
                             PlaceholderText="Tìm kiếm món ăn..."/>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Table Selector (If creating new) -->
            <ComboBox Grid.Column="1" 
                      ItemsSource="{Binding Tables}" 
                      SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedTable}"
                      DisplayMemberPath="Name"
                      Width="200" Margin="0,12,16,12" Height="40"
                      Style="{StaticResource ModernComboBoxStyle}"/>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Categories (Horizontal Tabs) -->
        <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Hidden" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled" Background="White" Padding="16,8">
            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Categories}">
                <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                    <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"/>
                    </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate>
                        <RadioButton GroupName="Categories" 
                                     Content="{Binding Name}"
                                     IsChecked="{Binding IsSelected}"
                                     Command="{Binding DataContext.SelectCategoryCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}"
                                     CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                     Style="{StaticResource CategoryTabStyle}"/>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
            </ItemsControl>
        </ScrollViewer>

        <!-- Product Grid -->
        <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2" Padding="16">
            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Products}">
                <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                    <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                        <WrapPanel ItemWidth="160" ItemHeight="200"/>
                    </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                <!-- Card Template -->
            </ItemsControl>
        </ScrollViewer>
    </Grid>

    <!-- Right: Cart -->
    <Grid Grid.Column="1" Background="White">
        <!-- ... Cart Layout ... -->
    </Grid>
</Grid>
```

I'll do this in one big `replace_file_content` for the `Grid` content if possible, or `multi_replace`.
Since the structure changes significantly (Filters Grid is gone, replaced by Top Bar), it's better to replace the whole `Grid` content.

I'll use `replace_file_content` on the `Grid` inside `UserControl`.

```xml
    <Grid Background="#F1F5F9">
        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
            <ColumnDefinition Width="400"/>
        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

        <!-- LEFT SIDE -->
        <Grid Grid.Column="0">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Top Bar -->
                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <!-- Categories -->
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>    <!-- Products -->
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>

            <!-- Top Bar -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="White" Padding="16,12" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                    <!-- Title -->
                    <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding IsAddingToExistingOrder, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToTitleConverter}}" 
                                 FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1E293B"/>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <!-- Search (Visual Only) -->
                    <Border Grid.Column="1" Background="#F8FAFC" CornerRadius="8" Margin="24,0" Height="40" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1">
                        <Grid>
                            <fa:IconImage Icon="Search" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#94A3B8" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Margin="12,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="Tìm kiếm món ăn..." Foreground="#94A3B8" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="36,0,0,0" FontStyle="Italic"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </Border>

                    <!-- Table Selector -->
                    <ComboBox Grid.Column="2" 
                              ItemsSource="{Binding Tables}" 
                              SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedTable}"
                              DisplayMemberPath="Name"
                              Width="200" Height="40"
                              Padding="10,0"
                              Background="White"
                              BorderBrush="#E2E8F0">
                         <!-- ... Style ... -->
                    </ComboBox>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- Categories -->
            <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Disabled" Background="White" Padding="16,12,16,4">
                <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Categories}">
                    <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"/>
                        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                    <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        <DataTemplate>
                            <RadioButton GroupName="CategoryGroup" 
                                         Content="{Binding Name}"
                                         IsChecked="{Binding IsSelected}"
                                         Command="{Binding DataContext.SelectCategoryCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}"
                                         CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                         Margin="0,0,8,8"
                                         Height="36"
                                         Padding="16,0"
                                         Cursor="Hand">
                                <RadioButton.Template>
                                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="RadioButton">
                                        <Border Name="Border" Background="#F1F5F9" CornerRadius="18" BorderThickness="1" BorderBrush="Transparent">
                                            <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/>
                                        </Border>
                                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                            <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="True">
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#0091EA"/>
                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                                            </Trigger>
                                            <Trigger Property="IsChecked" Value="False">
                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#64748B"/>
                                            </Trigger>
                                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                    </ControlTemplate>
                                </RadioButton.Template>
                            </RadioButton>
                        </DataTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                </ItemsControl>
            </ScrollViewer>

            <!-- Products -->
            <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2" Padding="16">
                <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Products}">
                    <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                            <WrapPanel />
                        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                    <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        <DataTemplate>
                            <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.AddToCartCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                                    CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                    Margin="0,0,12,12"
                                    Background="White"
                                    BorderThickness="0"
                                    Cursor="Hand">
                                <Button.Template>
                                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                        <Border Background="White" CornerRadius="8" Width="160" Height="200" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1">
                                            <Border.Effect>
                                                <DropShadowEffect Color="#64748B" Opacity="0.05" BlurRadius="8" ShadowDepth="2"/>
                                            </Border.Effect>
                                            <Grid>
                                                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                                    <RowDefinition Height="110"/>
                                                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                                                </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                                
                                                <!-- Image -->
                                                <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#F8FAFC" CornerRadius="8,8,0,0">
                                                    <fa:IconImage Icon="Utensils" Width="32" Height="32" Foreground="#CBD5E1"/>
                                                </Border>
                                                
                                                <!-- Info -->
                                                <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Padding="12">
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="14" TextWrapping="Wrap" MaxHeight="40" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis" Foreground="#334155"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" Foreground="#0091EA" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14" Margin="0,4,0,0"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </Grid>
                                        </Border>
                                    </ControlTemplate>
                                </Button.Template>
                            </Button>
                        </DataTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                </ItemsControl>
            </ScrollViewer>
        </Grid>

        <!-- RIGHT SIDE: CART -->
        <Border Grid.Column="1" Background="White" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1,0,0,0">
            <Grid>
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>

                <!-- Cart Header -->
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Padding="20,16" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                    <Grid>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="Đơn Hàng" FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1E293B"/>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                                <fa:IconImage Icon="Table" Width="12" Height="12" Foreground="#64748B" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedTable.Name, TargetNullValue='Chưa chọn bàn'}" Foreground="#64748B" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.DeleteAllCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                                HorizontalAlignment="Right" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                            <fa:IconImage Icon="TrashAlt" Width="16" Height="16" Foreground="#EF4444"/>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <!-- Cart Items -->
                <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" Padding="0">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding CartItems}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border BorderBrush="#F1F5F9" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1" Padding="16,12" Background="White">
                                    <Grid>
                                        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                                        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ProductName}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Foreground="#334155" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding UnitPrice, StringFormat={}{0:N0}}" FontSize="12" Foreground="#94A3B8"/>
                                        </StackPanel>

                                        <!-- Qty -->
                                        <Border Grid.Column="1" CornerRadius="4" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1" Margin="12,0">
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                                <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.DecreaseQuantityCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                                        Width="28" Height="28" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0">
                                                    <fa:IconImage Icon="Minus" Width="10" Height="10" Foreground="#64748B"/>
                                                </Button>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Quantity}" Width="24" TextAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                                <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.IncreaseQuantityCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                                        Width="28" Height="28" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0">
                                                    <fa:IconImage Icon="Plus" Width="10" Height="10" Foreground="#64748B"/>
                                                </Button>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Border>

                                        <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding Subtotal, StringFormat={}{0:N0}}" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#334155" MinWidth="60" TextAlignment="Right"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>

                <!-- Footer -->
                <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#F8FAFC" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0" Padding="20">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <Grid Margin="0,0,0,16">
                            <TextBlock Text="Tổng tiền hàng" Foreground="#64748B"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalAmount, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1E293B" HorizontalAlignment="Right"/>
                        </Grid>
                        <Grid Margin="0,0,0,24">
                            <TextBlock Text="Khách cần trả" FontSize="16" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#1E293B"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalAmount, StringFormat={}{0:N0} đ}" FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#0091EA" HorizontalAlignment="Right"/>
                        </Grid>

                        <Button Command="{Binding SubmitOrderCommand}" 
                                Height="48"
                                Background="#0091EA" 
                                Foreground="White" 
                                FontWeight="Bold" 
                                FontSize="16"
                                BorderThickness="0"
                                Cursor="Hand">
                            <Button.Resources>
                                <Style TargetType="Border">
                                    <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="8"/>
                                </Style>
                            </Button.Resources>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                                <fa:IconImage Icon="Check" Width="16" Height="16" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="THANH TOÁN / LƯU"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Loading -->
        <Grid Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Background="#80FFFFFF" Visibility="{Binding IsLoading, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}">
             <!-- ... -->
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
```

```xml
<ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="{TemplateBinding Padding}"/>
```

I am binding `Margin` to `TemplateBinding Padding`.
Wait, the error says "The property 'Padding' does not exist in XML namespace".
This usually means I am trying to set `Padding` on an element that doesn't support it, OR I am using it in a way XAML doesn't like.


Error: `The property 'Spin' does not exist in XML namespace 'clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp'.`
Ah, `FontAwesome.Sharp.IconImage` might not have `Spin` property directly?
Or maybe it's `IconBlock` that has it?
Let's check `FontAwesome.Sharp` documentation or usage.
Usually `IconImage` is just an image source wrapper. `IconBlock` (TextBlock based) or `IconPictureBox` (WinForms) might have it.
In WPF, `IconImage` inherits from `Image`. `Image` doesn't have `Spin`.
To make it spin, I need a `RenderTransform` with animation.

I'll remove `Spin="True"` and just use a static icon for now, or add a rotation animation style.

If I change it to `partial class` and inherit `ObservableObject`, I need to change properties to `[ObservableProperty]` or raise `OnPropertyChanged`.
For `Duration`, it's the only one changing dynamically on the client (timer).
