So [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:2:0-24:1) should implement `INotifyPropertyChanged` or inherit `ObservableObject`.

```csharp
    [ObservableProperty]
    private ObservableCollection<string> floors = new();

    [ObservableProperty]
    private string selectedFloor = "Tất cả";

    private DispatcherTimer _timer;

    // In Constructor:
    _timer = new DispatcherTimer();
    _timer.Interval = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1);
    _timer.Tick += Timer_Tick;
    _timer.Start();

    // Timer_Tick:
    private void Timer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
    {
        foreach (var table in Tables)
        {
            UpdateTableDuration(table);
        }
    }

    private void UpdateTableDuration(TableDto table)
    {
        if (!table.IsAvailable && table.OccupiedAt.HasValue)
        {
            var diff = DateTime.UtcNow - table.OccupiedAt.Value;
            table.Duration = $"{(int)diff.TotalHours:00}:{diff.Minutes:00}";
        }
        else
        {
            table.Duration = "";
        }
    }

    // LoadTables:
    // ... load all tables ...
    // Extract distinct floors
    // Filter by SelectedFloor
    // Call UpdateTableDuration for each
```

```csharp
        [ObservableProperty]
        private ObservableCollection<string> floors = new();

        [ObservableProperty]
        private string selectedFloor = "Tất cả";

        private System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherTimer _timer;

        // Constructor
        public TableManagementViewModel(...) {
            // ...
            _timer = new System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherTimer();
            _timer.Interval = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1);
            _timer.Tick += (s, e) => UpdateDurations();
            _timer.Start();
        }

        private void UpdateDurations()
        {
             foreach (var table in Tables)
             {
                 if (!table.IsAvailable && table.OccupiedAt.HasValue)
                 {
                     var diff = DateTime.UtcNow - table.OccupiedAt.Value;
                     // Format: HH:mm (if > 24h, show days?)
                     // User asked for "thời gian đếm".
                     table.Duration = $"{(int)diff.TotalHours:00}:{diff.Minutes:00}";
                 }
                 else
                 {
                     table.Duration = "";
                 }
             }
        }

        partial void OnSelectedFloorChanged(string value)
        {
            _ = LoadTables();
        }
```

```xml
<!-- Inside Table Info StackPanel -->
<TextBlock Text="{Binding Duration}" 
           FontSize="14" 
           FontWeight="Bold" 
           Foreground="#EF4444" 
           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
           Margin="0,4,0,0"
           Visibility="{Binding IsAvailable, Converter={StaticResource InverseBooleanToVisibilityConverter}}"/>
```
I need `InverseBooleanToVisibilityConverter`. If not available, I can use Style Trigger.

```xml
<TextBlock FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#EF4444" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4,0,0">
    <TextBlock.Style>
        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
            <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
            <Setter Property="Text" Value="{Binding Duration}"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsAvailable}" Value="False">
                    <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Visible"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>
    </TextBlock.Style>
</TextBlock>
```

### Planner Response

`GetFromJsonAsync` uses default options. In .NET 8, `PropertyNameCaseInsensitive` is `false` by default for `System.Text.Json` unless using `JsonSerializerDefaults.Web`. `HttpClient.GetFromJsonAsync` *does* use `JsonSerializerDefaults.Web` which sets `PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true`.
So [Floor](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:176:8-179:9) (C#) should match `floor` (JSON).

However, I should verify if the API actually returns `floor`.

In KiotViet, floors/areas are usually tabs at the top or a list on the side.
I used a `ComboBox` to save space, but `ItemsControl` (Tabs) is more "KiotViet-like".
I had `ItemsControl` commented out in my previous edit.
Maybe I should switch to Tabs (RadioButtons) as it's more accessible than a dropdown for frequently switched filters.

It's better UX for POS.

I'll modify [TableManagementView.xaml](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/TableManagementView.xaml:0:0-0:0) to use `ItemsControl` with `RadioButton` for Floors.
I need to ensure the binding works.
Binding `IsChecked` in a dynamic list of RadioButtons to a single [SelectedFloor](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:176:8-179:9) string property in ViewModel is tricky in pure XAML without a converter.
A common approach:
1.  Use `ListBox` with a custom `ItemsPanel` (StackPanel Horizontal) and `ItemContainerStyle` (RadioButton style).
    `ListBox` handles `SelectedItem` binding perfectly.
    I just need to style the `ListBoxItem` to look like a RadioButton or a Tab.

I'll use `ListBox` for Floor Filter.

```xml
<ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding Floors}" 
         SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedFloor}"
         Background="Transparent"
         BorderThickness="0"
         Margin="0,0,20,0">
    <ListBox.ItemsPanel>
        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"/>
        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
    </ListBox.ItemsPanel>
    <ListBox.ItemContainerStyle>
        <Style TargetType="ListBoxItem">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ListBoxItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Border" 
                                Background="Transparent" 
                                CornerRadius="4" 
                                Padding="12,6" 
                                Margin="0,0,4,0"
                                Cursor="Hand">
                            <ContentPresenter/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="False">
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#64748B"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#1E293B"/>
                            </Trigger>
                            <MultiTrigger>
                                <MultiTrigger.Conditions>
                                    <Condition Property="IsSelected" Value="True"/>
                                    <Condition Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True"/>
                                </MultiTrigger.Conditions>
                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#2563EB"/>
                            </MultiTrigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
    </ListBox.ItemContainerStyle>
</ListBox>
```

This is much better than ComboBox.

I made a mistake assuming [ITableService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/ITableService.cs:0:0-0:0) exists in API. It's likely `RestaurantPOS.API` doesn't use a Service layer for Tables, just Controller + Context (as seen in [TablesController.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:0:0-0:0)).

**Findings from [TablesController.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:0:0-0:0):**
1.  **Merge Endpoint:** `POST api/Tables/Merge` exists.
    *   Takes [MergeTablesRequest](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:267:4-270:5) (`List<int> TableIds`).
    *   Checks if tables exist and are available.
    *   Sets `IsMerged = true`, `MergedGroupId`, `MergedTableNumbers`.
    *   Sets `IsAvailable = false` (Occupied).
    *   **Limitation:** It requires tables to be **Available** to merge.
    *   **User Scenario:** Usually, you might want to merge occupied tables too (e.g., move guests together). But the current logic enforces "Empty tables only".
    *   I should stick to the current logic for now: Select multiple empty tables -> Merge.
    *   Or, if the user wants to merge *orders*, that's different.
    *   "Ghép bàn" usually means physically putting tables together for a large group. So "Empty tables" makes sense.
    *   But what if they are already seated separately and want to join?
    *   The controller says: `if (tables.Any(t => !t.IsAvailable)) return BadRequest("Tất cả bàn phải trống để ghép");`
    *   So I can only merge empty tables.

2.  **Split Endpoint:** `POST api/Tables/Split/{groupId}` exists.
    *   Checks for pending orders. If any, blocks split.
    *   Resets `IsMerged`, `MergedGroupId`, etc.
    *   Sets `IsAvailable = true`.

Now update [TableService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:0:0-0:0).

```csharp
    public async Task<bool> MergeTablesAsync(List<int> tableIds)
    {
        try
        {
            AddAuthorizationHeader();
            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/Tables/Merge", new { TableIds = tableIds });
            return response.IsSuccessStatusCode;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"TableService: Error merging tables - {ex.Message}");
            return false;
        }
    }

    public async Task<bool> SplitTablesAsync(int groupId)
    {
        try
        {
            AddAuthorizationHeader();
            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsync($"api/Tables/Split/{groupId}", null);
            return response.IsSuccessStatusCode;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine($"TableService: Error splitting tables - {ex.Message}");
            return false;
        }
    }
```

Now update [TableManagementViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0).

I need:
1.  `IsMergeMode` (bool).
2.  `SelectedTablesForMerge` (ObservableCollection<TableDto> or List).
3.  `ToggleMergeModeCommand`.
4.  `ToggleTableSelectionCommand` (for merge).
5.  `ConfirmMergeCommand`.
6.  `SplitTableCommand`.

Logic:
*   **ToggleMergeMode:** Clears selection, sets `IsMergeMode = !IsMergeMode`.
*   **SelectTable (Existing):** If `IsMergeMode`, toggle selection. Else, navigate.
*   **ConfirmMerge:** Call `_tableService.MergeTablesAsync`.
*   **SplitTable:** Call `_tableService.SplitTablesAsync`.

I'll modify [TableManagementViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0).

```csharp
    [ObservableProperty]
    private bool isMergeMode;

    [ObservableProperty]
    private ObservableCollection<TableDto> selectedTablesForMerge = new();

    [RelayCommand]
    private void ToggleMergeMode()
    {
        IsMergeMode = !IsMergeMode;
        SelectedTablesForMerge.Clear();
        // Maybe refresh tables to clear any visual selection state if bound directly
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task ConfirmMerge()
    {
        if (SelectedTablesForMerge.Count < 2)
        {
            _toastService.ShowWarning("Vui lòng chọn ít nhất 2 bàn để ghép.");
            return;
        }

        var ids = SelectedTablesForMerge.Select(t => t.Id).ToList();
        var success = await _tableService.MergeTablesAsync(ids);
        if (success)
        {
            _toastService.ShowSuccess("Ghép bàn thành công!");
            IsMergeMode = false;
            SelectedTablesForMerge.Clear();
            await LoadTables();
        }
        else
        {
            _toastService.ShowError("Ghép bàn thất bại. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.");
        }
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task SplitTable(TableDto table)
    {
        if (!table.IsMerged || !table.MergedGroupId.HasValue) return;

        var result = MessageBox.Show($"Bạn có chắc muốn tách nhóm bàn {table.MergedTableNumbers}?", "Xác nhận tách bàn", MessageBoxButton.YesNo);
        if (result == MessageBoxResult.Yes)
        {
            var success = await _tableService.SplitTablesAsync(table.MergedGroupId.Value);
            if (success)
            {
                _toastService.ShowSuccess("Tách bàn thành công!");
                await LoadTables();
            }
            else
            {
                _toastService.ShowError("Tách bàn thất bại.");
            }
        }
    }
```

And update [SelectTable](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:144:8-159:9) method:
```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private void SelectTable(TableDto table)
        {
            if (table == null) return;

            if (IsMergeMode)
            {
                if (SelectedTablesForMerge.Contains(table))
                {
                    SelectedTablesForMerge.Remove(table);
                }
                else
                {
                    // Only allow Available tables for merge (as per API limitation)
                    if (!table.IsAvailable)
                    {
                        _toastService.ShowWarning("Chỉ có thể ghép các bàn trống.");
                        return;
                    }
                    SelectedTablesForMerge.Add(table);
                }
                return;
            }

            // ... existing navigation logic ...
        }
```

                else

                            Background="White" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="1" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,10,0" Style="{StaticResource ModernButtonStyle}">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <TextBlock Text="🔗" FontSize="14" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="Ghép bàn" FontSize="13" Foreground="#4A5568"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                    
                    <!-- Refresh Button -->
                    ...
                </StackPanel>

```xml
<UserControl x:Class="RestaurantPOS.Desktop.Views.TableManagementView"
             xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:mc="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/markup-compatibility/2006" 
             xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/expression/blend/2008" 
             xmlns:fa="clr-namespace:FontAwesome.Sharp;assembly=FontAwesome.Sharp"
             mc:Ignorable="d" 
             d:DesignHeight="768" d:DesignWidth="1024">
    
    <Grid Background="#F5F5F5">
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <Grid.Resources>
            <Style x:Key="FilterRadioButtonStyle" TargetType="RadioButton">
                <!-- ... style content ... -->
            </Style>
            <Style x:Key="ModernButtonStyle" TargetType="Button">
                 <Setter Property="Template">
                    <Setter.Value>
                        <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                            <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" 
                                    BorderBrush="{TemplateBinding BorderBrush}" 
                                    BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}" 
                                    CornerRadius="6" 
                                    Padding="{TemplateBinding Padding}">
                                <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            </Border>
                        </ControlTemplate>
                    </Setter.Value>
                </Setter>
                <Style.Triggers>
                    <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                        <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.9"/>
                    </Trigger>
                </Style.Triggers>
            </Style>
        </Grid.Resources>

        <!-- Page Header -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="White" Padding="30,20" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
            <Grid>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                    <TextBlock Text="Quản lý Bàn" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#2D3748" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <Border Background="#EBF5FF" CornerRadius="4" Padding="8,4" Margin="15,0,0,0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Tables.Count, StringFormat='{}Tổng: {0} bàn'}" FontSize="12" Foreground="#3B82F6" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    </Border>
                </StackPanel>

                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Right">
                    <!-- Merge Actions -->
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,10,0" Visibility="{Binding IsMergeMode, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}">
                        <Button Command="{Binding ConfirmMergeCommand}" Content="Xác nhận" Background="#10B981" Foreground="White" Padding="12,8" BorderThickness="0" Style="{StaticResource ModernButtonStyle}" Margin="0,0,10,0" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        <Button Command="{Binding ToggleMergeModeCommand}" Content="Hủy" Background="#EF4444" Foreground="White" Padding="12,8" BorderThickness="0" Style="{StaticResource ModernButtonStyle}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <Button Command="{Binding ToggleMergeModeCommand}" 
                            Visibility="{Binding IsMergeMode, Converter={StaticResource InverseBooleanToVisibilityConverter}}"
                            Background="White" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="1" Padding="12,8" Margin="0,0,10,0" Cursor="Hand" Style="{StaticResource ModernButtonStyle}">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <fa:IconImage Icon="Link" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#4A5568" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="Ghép bàn" FontSize="13" Foreground="#4A5568"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>

                    <Button Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}" Background="White" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="1" Padding="12,8" Cursor="Hand" Style="{StaticResource ModernButtonStyle}">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                            <fa:IconImage Icon="RotateRight" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#4A5568" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="Làm mới" FontSize="13" Foreground="#4A5568"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Filter Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="1" Background="White" Padding="30,15" BorderBrush="#E0E0E0" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <!-- Search -->
                <Border CornerRadius="6" Background="#F1F5F9" Padding="10,6" Margin="0,0,20,0" Width="250">
                    <Grid>
                        <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/>
                            <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                        </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                        <fa:IconImage Icon="MagnifyingGlass" Width="14" Height="14" Foreground="#94A3B8"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding SearchText, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}" Margin="8,0,0,0" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="13"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <TextBlock Text="Trạng thái:" FontSize="13" Foreground="#718096" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
                <Border CornerRadius="6" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1" Background="#F8FAFC" Padding="2" Margin="0,0,20,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <RadioButton Content="Tất cả" Command="{Binding FilterCommand}" CommandParameter="All" IsChecked="True" GroupName="TableFilter" Style="{StaticResource FilterRadioButtonStyle}"/>
                        <RadioButton Content="Trống" Command="{Binding FilterCommand}" CommandParameter="Available" GroupName="TableFilter" Style="{StaticResource FilterRadioButtonStyle}"/>
                        <RadioButton Content="Đang phục vụ" Command="{Binding FilterCommand}" CommandParameter="Occupied" GroupName="TableFilter" Style="{StaticResource FilterRadioButtonStyle}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>

                <!-- Floor Filter (ListBox) -->
                <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding Floors}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedFloor}" Background="Transparent" BorderThickness="0" Margin="0,0,20,0" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <ListBox.ItemsPanel>
                        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal"/>
                        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                    </ListBox.ItemsPanel>
                    <ListBox.ItemContainerStyle>
                        <Style TargetType="ListBoxItem">
                            <Setter Property="Template">
                                <Setter.Value>
                                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="ListBoxItem">
                                        <Border x:Name="Border" Background="Transparent" CornerRadius="6" Padding="12,6" Margin="0,0,4,0" Cursor="Hand" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1">
                                            <ContentPresenter/>
                                        </Border>
                                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                                            </Trigger>
                                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="False">
                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#64748B"/>
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#F8FAFC"/>
                                            </Trigger>
                                            <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
                                            </Trigger>
                                            <MultiTrigger>
                                                <MultiTrigger.Conditions>
                                                    <Condition Property="IsSelected" Value="True"/>
                                                    <Condition Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True"/>
                                                </MultiTrigger.Conditions>
                                                <Setter TargetName="Border" Property="Background" Value="#2563EB"/>
                                            </MultiTrigger>
                                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                                    </ControlTemplate>
                                </Setter.Value>
                            </Setter>
                        </Style>
                    </ListBox.ItemContainerStyle>
                </ListBox>

                <TextBlock Text="Sức chứa:" FontSize="13" Foreground="#718096" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,10,0"/>
                <ComboBox SelectedValue="{Binding FilterCapacity}" SelectedValuePath="Tag" Width="120" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <ComboBoxItem Content="Tất cả" Tag="0" IsSelected="True"/>
                    <ComboBoxItem Content="2+ người" Tag="2"/>
                    <ComboBoxItem Content="4+ người" Tag="4"/>
                    <ComboBoxItem Content="6+ người" Tag="6"/>
                    <ComboBoxItem Content="8+ người" Tag="8"/>
                </ComboBox>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- Tables Grid -->
        <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Tables}" Margin="30,20">
                <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                    <ItemsPanelTemplate>
                        <WrapPanel Orientation="Horizontal"/>
                    </ItemsPanelTemplate>
                </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel>
                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    <DataTemplate>
                        <Button Command="{Binding DataContext.SelectTableCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}"
                                CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                Width="200" Height="160" Margin="0,0,20,20" Cursor="Hand" BorderThickness="0">
                            <Button.Template>
                                <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
                                    <Border Background="White" CornerRadius="12" BorderBrush="#E2E8F0" BorderThickness="1">
                                        <Border.Effect>
                                            <DropShadowEffect Color="#64748B" Opacity="0.1" BlurRadius="10" ShadowDepth="4"/>
                                        </Border.Effect>
                                        <Border.Style>
                                            <Style TargetType="Border">
                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E2E8F0"/>
                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsSelected}" Value="True">
                                                        <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3B82F6"/>
                                                        <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="3"/>
                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsMerged}" Value="True">
                                                        <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#8B5CF6"/>
                                                        <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="2"/>
                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                            </Style>
                                        </Border.Style>
                                        <Border.ContextMenu>
                                            <ContextMenu>
                                                <MenuItem Header="Tách bàn" 
                                                          Command="{Binding DataContext.SplitTableCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}" 
                                                          CommandParameter="{Binding}"
                                                          Visibility="{Binding IsMerged, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}">
                                                    <MenuItem.Icon>
                                                        <fa:IconImage Icon="Unlink" Width="16" Height="16" Foreground="#EF4444"/>
                                                    </MenuItem.Icon>
                                                </MenuItem>
                                            </ContextMenu>
                                        </Border.ContextMenu>

                                        <Grid>
                                            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                                <RowDefinition Height="6"/>
                                                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                                                <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                                            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                                            
                                            <!-- Status Indicator -->
                                            <Border Grid.Row="0" CornerRadius="12,12,0,0">
                                                <Border.Style>
                                                    <Style TargetType="Border">
                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#10B981"/>
                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsAvailable}" Value="False">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F59E0B"/>
                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsMerged}" Value="True">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#8B5CF6"/>
                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                    </Style>
                                                </Border.Style>
                                            </Border>

                                            <!-- Table Info -->
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="20,10">
                                                <fa:IconImage Icon="Chair" Width="32" Height="32" Margin="0,0,0,10">
                                                    <fa:IconImage.Style>
                                                        <Style TargetType="fa:IconImage">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#10B981"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsAvailable}" Value="False">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#F59E0B"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsMerged}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#8B5CF6"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </fa:IconImage.Style>
                                                </fa:IconImage>

                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#334155" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                                                
                                                <TextBlock FontSize="13" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                                    <TextBlock.Style>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Text" Value="Trống"/>
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#10B981"/>
                                                            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsAvailable}" Value="False">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Text" Value="Đang phục vụ"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#F59E0B"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsMerged}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Text" Value="Đã ghép"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#8B5CF6"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </TextBlock.Style>
                                                </TextBlock>

                                                <TextBlock FontSize="14" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#EF4444" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,4,0,0">
                                                    <TextBlock.Style>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/>
                                                            <Setter Property="Text" Value="{Binding Duration}"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsAvailable}" Value="False">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Visible"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </TextBlock.Style>
                                                </TextBlock>
                                            </StackPanel>

                                            <!-- Footer Info -->
                                            <Border Grid.Row="2" BorderBrush="#F1F5F9" BorderThickness="0,1,0,0" Padding="15,10" Background="#FAFAFA" CornerRadius="0,0,12,12">
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                                                    <fa:IconImage Icon="UserGroup" Width="12" Height="12" Foreground="#94A3B8" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Foreground="#64748B" FontSize="12">
                                                        <Run Text="Sức chứa:"/>
                                                        <Run Text="{Binding Capacity}" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                                                    </TextBlock>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </Border>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Border>
                                </ControlTemplate>
                            </Button.Template>
                        </Button>
                    </DataTemplate>
                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
            </ItemsControl>
        </ScrollViewer>

        <!-- Loading Overlay -->
        <Grid Grid.RowSpan="3" Background="#80FFFFFF" Visibility="{Binding IsLoading, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}">
            <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <TextBlock Text="⏳" FontSize="48" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Text="Đang tải..." Foreground="#3B82F6" Margin="0,10,0,0" FontSize="16"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>
```

### Planner Response

Build succeeded.

I have implemented:
1.  **Merge Tables:**
    *   Backend API already supported [Merge](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:156:8-202:9) and [Split](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/OrdersController.cs:151:4-168:7).
    *   Added [MergeTablesAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:87:4-100:5) and [SplitTablesAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:102:4-115:5) to [TableService](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:11:4-15:5) (Desktop).
    *   Updated [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:4:0-43:1) with `IsMerged`, `MergedGroupId`, `IsSelected` (for UI).
    *   Updated [TableManagementViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:11:4-274:5) with `IsMergeMode`, `SelectedTablesForMerge`, [ConfirmMerge](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:161:8-183:9), [SplitTable](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:185:8-204:9) commands.
    *   Updated [TableManagementView](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:11:4-274:5) with "Ghép bàn" button, selection UI, and "Tách bàn" context menu.

**Limitation:**
*   Currently, only **Available** tables can be merged (Backend restriction).
*   If the user wants to merge occupied tables, the backend logic needs to be changed to handle order merging, which is complex.
*   For now, this fulfills the "Ghép bàn" requirement for setting up large groups *before* ordering.

I'll inform the user.

"Tôi đã hoàn thành tính năng **Ghép bàn / Tách bàn**:

1.  **Ghép bàn:**
    *   Nhấn nút **"Ghép bàn"** trên thanh công cụ.
    *   Chọn các bàn muốn ghép (chỉ áp dụng cho bàn Trống).
    *   Nhấn **"Xác nhận"** để tạo nhóm bàn.
    *   Bàn ghép sẽ hiển thị màu tím và trạng thái "Đã ghép".

2.  **Tách bàn:**
    *   Chuột phải vào bàn đã ghép -> Chọn **"Tách bàn"**.
    *   Hệ thống sẽ tách nhóm bàn trở lại trạng thái ban đầu.

Lưu ý: Hiện tại hệ thống chỉ hỗ trợ ghép các bàn **Trống** để chuẩn bị đón khách đoàn. Nếu bạn cần ghép các bàn **đang có khách** (gộp đơn), tôi cần cập nhật thêm logic xử lý đơn hàng ở Backend.

Tiếp theo, tôi sẽ xử lý phần **Tách đơn** (chia món sang đơn khác hoặc tách hóa đơn). Bạn có muốn tiếp tục với phần này không?"

### Planner Response

Line 227: `Command="{Binding DataContext.SplitTableCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}"`
This is definitely the issue. `ContextMenu` is not in the visual tree of `UserControl`, so `RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl` returns null.

**Fix:**
1.  Add `Tag="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=UserControl}}"` to the `Border` (Line 204).
2.  Change Command Binding to `Command="{Binding PlacementTarget.Tag.SplitTableCommand, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=ContextMenu}}"`.

I'll apply this fix.

Wait, `Border` is inside `ControlTemplate` of a `Button`.
The `Button` is inside `DataTemplate`.
So `AncestorType=UserControl` works for the `Border`'s Tag binding because `Border` is in the visual tree (inside the Button).

I'll modify [TableManagementView.xaml](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Views/TableManagementView.xaml:0:0-0:0).

### Planner Response

The [OrderService](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:8:4-385:5) logic for [CompleteOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:170:4-199:5) (lines 323-371) and [UpdateOrderStatusAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:92:8-130:9) (lines 93-131) only frees the *specific* table associated with the order (`order.TableId`).
It does **not** check if the table is part of a merged group.

If I have merged tables (e.g., Table 1 and Table 2 are merged into Group 100), and I create an order for Table 1:
1.  Order is created with `TableId = 1`.
2.  Table 1 is marked `IsAvailable = false`.
3.  Table 2 is *also* marked `IsAvailable = false` by the [MergeTables](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:156:8-202:9) endpoint (which I saw earlier).

When I complete the order for Table 1:
1.  [CompleteOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:170:4-199:5) checks pending orders for Table 1.
2.  If none, it sets Table 1 `IsAvailable = true`.
3.  **Table 2 remains `IsAvailable = false` (Occupied).** This is a bug.

**Solution:**
I need to update [OrderService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:0:0-0:0) (and potentially [TablesController.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:0:0-0:0) or [TableService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:0:0-0:0) in API) to handle merged tables.
When an order is completed/cancelled for a table, I should check if that table is merged. If so, I should check if *all* tables in that merged group are ready to be freed.
Actually, if the tables are merged, they act as one unit. So if the order (which represents the group's consumption) is paid, *all* tables in the group should be freed.

**However**, I cannot easily modify the API logic right now without risking stability, as I don't have the full context of [Table](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Table.cs:5:4-30:5) entity in the API (I haven't seen [Table.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Table.cs:0:0-0:0) in API, only DTO).
Wait, I can see `RestaurantPOS.API.Models.Table` via `view_file` if I want.

But I can handle this on the **Client Side** for now, or make a targeted API change.
The user asked to "handle create order, payment for merged tables".

**Client Side Strategy:**
1.  **Create Order:**
    *   When clicking a table in a merged group, find the "Master" table (e.g., the one with the active order, or the first one).
    *   If no order exists for *any* table in the group, create an order for the *selected* table.
    *   Since all tables in the group are "Occupied" (Red/Orange), the UI should allow opening the order.
    *   Problem: If I click Table 2 (merged with Table 1), and Table 1 has the order, [GetOrdersByTable(2)](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/OrdersController.cs:46:6-52:1) returns nothing.
    *   **Fix:** In [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:10:0-296:1) (or where we check for existing orders), if the table is merged, we must check for orders on *all* tables in the merged group.

2.  **Payment:**
    *   When payment is successful, the API frees the order's table.
    *   The Client (SignalR or manual refresh) sees Table 1 is free.
    *   Table 2 is still occupied.
    *   **Fix:** The Client needs to call [SplitTables](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:204:8-238:9) or [UpdateTableStatus](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/TableService.cs:56:4-70:5) for the other tables? No, that's messy.
    *   **Better Fix:** Update the API [OrderService](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:8:4-385:5) to handle merged tables. This is the robust way.

I need to know if [Table](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Table.cs:5:4-30:5) entity has `MergedGroupId`. I saw [TableDto](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Models/TableModels.cs:4:0-43:1) has it, so [Table](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Table.cs:5:4-30:5) entity likely has it too.

Yes, [Table](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Models/Table.cs:5:4-30:5) has `MergedGroupId`.

**Plan for API Update ([OrderService.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:0:0-0:0)):**
1.  In [CompleteOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:170:4-199:5) (and [UpdateOrderStatusAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Services/OrderService.cs:92:8-130:9) if it handles completion), when freeing the table:
    *   Check if `table.IsMerged` is true.
    *   If true, find all tables with the same `MergedGroupId`.
    *   Set `IsAvailable = true` and `OccupiedAt = null` for *all* of them.
    *   **Crucial:** Do we unmerge them? Usually, no. They stay merged but become available (Empty Merged).
    *   *However*, my [MergeTables](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:156:8-202:9) logic sets `IsAvailable = false`. If I set them to `true`, they will look like "Empty Merged" (Green + Violet border). This is good.
    *   But wait, if they are "Empty Merged", can I create a new order for them?
    *   Yes, if I select one, I create an order.
    *   The issue is [MergeTables](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:156:8-202:9) sets them to `Occupied` initially.
    *   If I pay, they become [Available](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:41:8-46:9).
    *   If I create a new order for *one* of them, only *that one* becomes `Occupied` (via [CreateOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:56:4-77:5) logic).
    *   The others remain [Available](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/TablesController.cs:41:8-46:9). This is inconsistent visual state (one Red, others Green, but all Merged).

**Refined Logic for [CreateOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:56:4-77:5):**
*   When creating an order for a table:
    *   Check if `table.IsMerged`.
    *   If yes, find all tables in `MergedGroupId`.
    *   Set *all* of them to `IsAvailable = false` and `OccupiedAt = DateTime.UtcNow`.

**Refined Logic for [CompleteOrderAsync](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/Services/OrderService.cs:170:4-199:5):**
*   When completing order:
    *   Check if `table.IsMerged`.
    *   If yes, find all tables in `MergedGroupId`.
    *   Set *all* of them to `IsAvailable = true` and `OccupiedAt = null`.

This ensures consistent state for the group.

**Step 2: Frontend [CreateOrderViewModel](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/CreateOrderViewModel.cs:47:4-57:5) Logic:**

### Planner Response

In [SelectTable](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/TableManagementViewModel.cs:206:8-241:9) (Line 208):
```csharp
            if (table.Status == "Available")
            {
                WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("CreateOrder", table));
            }
            else
            {
                WeakReferenceMessenger.Default.Send(new NavigateToMessage("OrderDetail", table));
            }
```
This logic is simple.
If `IsMerged` is true, `IsAvailable` is false (Occupied).
So it goes to [OrderDetail](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:12:4-301:5).
In [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:12:4-301:5), it loads the order for `table.Id`.
If `table.Id` is NOT the one with the order (e.g., Table 2), [GetOrdersByTable(2)](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.API/Controllers/OrdersController.cs:46:6-52:1) returns empty.
So [OrderDetailView](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:12:4-301:5) shows "No Order".

**Fix in [OrderDetailViewModel](cci:2://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:12:4-301:5):**

**Refined Plan for [OrderDetailViewModel.cs](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/hhuy0/source/repos/HUYVESEA0/RestaurantPOS-System/RestaurantPOS.Desktop/ViewModels/OrderDetailViewModel.cs:0:0-0:0):**

```csharp
        [RelayCommand]
        private async Task LoadTableOrders()
        {
            if (CurrentTable == null) return;

            IsLoading = true;
            try
            {
                // Refresh table info
                var freshTable = await _tableService.GetTableByIdAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                if (freshTable != null) CurrentTable = freshTable;

                var allOrders = new List<OrderDto>();

                if (CurrentTable.IsMerged && CurrentTable.MergedGroupId.HasValue)
                {
                    // Get all tables to find group members
                    // Optimization: Add GetTablesByGroup API later. For now, fetch all.
                    var allTables = await _tableService.GetTablesAsync();
                    var groupTables = allTables.Where(t => t.MergedGroupId == CurrentTable.MergedGroupId).ToList();

                    foreach (var table in groupTables)
                    {
                        var orders = await _orderService.GetOrdersByTableAsync(table.Id);
                        allOrders.AddRange(orders);
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    var orders = await _orderService.GetOrdersByTableAsync(CurrentTable.Id);
                    allOrders.AddRange(orders);
                }

                // Filter logic (same as before)
                // ...
            }
            // ...
        }
```

3.  Quay lại trang Quản lý bàn -> Chọn Bàn 2 -> Sẽ thấy đơn hàng vừa tạo.
